title: astragalus cruciatus var. radians
intro: Astragalus cruciatus var. radians, also known as the prickly milk-vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its adaptogenic and antioxidant effects, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Astragalus cruciatus var. radians include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. Astragalus cruciatus var. radians can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with the dried roots and stems often being used in herbal preparations.
